Scripts.OnEnter: CombatEngine_Conditions_Tips( this );
GameTooltip:SetOwner( this ); GameTooltip:SetText( TEXT("QS_SETTINGS"), 0, 1, 1 );
COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_Slot_Skill_OnEnter( this );
this:GetParent().Text:SetHexColor("CCFFCC"); SetHyperlinkCursor(true);

Scripts.OnClick: if this:GetName() == "COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition19CheckBox" then if this:IsChecked() then COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition48CheckBox:SetChecked(false); end elseif this:GetName() == "COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition48CheckBox" then if this:IsChecked() then COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition19CheckBox:SetChecked(false); end end if this:GetName() == "COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition29CheckBox" then if this:IsChecked() then COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition45CheckBox:SetChecked(false); end elseif this:GetName() == "COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition45CheckBox" then if this:IsChecked() then COMBATENGINE_EDIT_LUA_CONDITIONSCondition29CheckBox:SetChecked(false); end end
